context.revisionGoal: Evaluate section-level coherence for a lead-plus-support arch and matrix treatment.

predictedStrengths: Model balance is weighted enough to preserve a clear lead-plus-support hierarchy.
Scene spread is large enough to support broader composition.
Frame-to-frame density remains stable through the sampled checkpoint.
Family spread is broad enough without losing the lead-target hierarchy.
Centroid motion indicates the active content is evolving, not frozen.
Lead-target hierarchy remains intact across the section.
predictedRisks: Section contrast is underdeveloped; the pass is not evolving enough over time.
prediction.predictionSummary: Sparse tree-only checkpoint reconstructed from authoritative render data.

truth.truthSummary: Authoritative xLights frames joined onto cached whole-layout geometry.

strengths: Model balance is weighted enough to preserve a clear lead-plus-support hierarchy.
Scene spread is large enough to support broader composition.
Frame-to-frame density remains stable through the sampled checkpoint.
Family spread is broad enough without losing the lead-target hierarchy.
Centroid motion indicates the active content is evolving, not frozen.
Lead-target hierarchy remains intact across the section.
weaknesses: Section contrast is underdeveloped; the pass is not evolving enough over time.
recommendedNextMoves: Clarify how the section should evolve from opening to closing instead of holding one static treatment.
Introduce a bounded section-level evolution in spread, density, or support role across the sampled window.

outcome.nextRevisionPriority: Clarify how the section should evolve from opening to closing instead of holding one static treatment.
